title: 2026-06-21 Shino Coastal Lab Aquarium
summary: Shino character day album in a fictional warm coastal port city, moving from standards lab safety wear to old-port market private clothes, aquarium observation, and an old-building lobby home return.
summaryJa: 架空の港町のアルバム。構成は仕事場、マーケット、ミュージアム、室内。

images.alt: Shino, adult 25-year-old recurring character, in a harbor-side product standards lab wearing pale gray safety workwear, black inner, charcoal utility trousers, ID lanyard, measurement probe, and small fish accessories
images.title: 01 Office lab safety fish pin
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / office / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino in an old-port market after rain wearing a white short-sleeve blouse, black mini wrap skort, pale blue shoulder cardigan, lavender socks, Mary Janes, and jellyfish bag charm while checking a folded map
images.title: 02 Market old port mini skort
images.tags: Anime Editorial / Fictional Port City / market / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino in a fictional coastal aquarium observation corridor wearing a pale aqua sleeveless blouse, black culottes, carried white cardigan, silver loafers, fish hairpin, jellyfish bag charm, and fish guidebook
images.title: 03 Gallery aquarium tunnel culottes
images.tags: Soft Anime / Fictional Port City / gallery / Shino 25

images.alt: Shino in the old-building lobby at night wearing a black sleeveless knit, lavender-gray open shirt, ivory culotte shorts, smoky knee socks, and mules, untangling headphones beside a fish guide, old-key charm, and DJ flyer
images.title: 04 Home old building lobby headphones
images.tags: Digital Painting / Fictional Port City / home / Shino 25
